evals.prompt: Review this login flow with a return_to parameter.
evals.expected_output: Flags return_to as a high-signal open redirect test case.

evals.prompt: Review this OAuth callback handling and redirect_uri validation.
evals.expected_output: Checks exact redirect_uri matching, state, nonce, PKCE, and chaining.

evals.prompt: Review this authenticated JSON settings update endpoint for CSRF.
evals.expected_output: Checks alternate content types, Origin, SameSite, and safe proof.

evals.prompt: Review this webhook URL validator that follows redirects.
evals.expected_output: Requires redirect revalidation and self-owned callback proof.

evals.prompt: Review this GraphQL API with node IDs, aliases, and nested resolvers.
evals.expected_output: Checks per-node and per-edge authorization, batching, and introspection.

evals.prompt: Review this profile update API for hidden writable fields.
evals.expected_output: Tests role, tenant, owner, status, and verification fields.

evals.prompt: Review this archive upload and extraction pipeline.
evals.expected_output: Checks canonical paths, symlinks, extensions, magic bytes, and storage.

evals.prompt: Review this CORS middleware that reflects allowed origins.
evals.expected_output: Checks null origin, suffix matching, credentials, and auth boundaries.

evals.prompt: Review this password reset email link generator.
evals.expected_output: Checks Host and X-Forwarded-Host influence on absolute URLs.

evals.prompt: Review this CDN to origin proxy chain for request smuggling risk.
evals.expected_output: Checks parser differentials, CL/TE ambiguity, H2 downgrade, and safety.

evals.prompt: Review this cached route that varies by forwarded headers.
evals.expected_output: Checks cache keys, unkeyed inputs, impact, and safe markers.

evals.prompt: Review this one-time coupon redemption endpoint for race conditions.
evals.expected_output: Checks concurrency, idempotency binding, replay, and low-impact proof.

evals.prompt: Review this JSON settings merge endpoint for prototype pollution.
evals.expected_output: Checks prototype-like keys and delayed impact in auth or config logic.
